_comment: Application settings for an anti-gaslight node. Copy to settings.json (gitignored) and edit. Wi-Fi credentials and OTA repo info live in /config.json (ugit's file) -- NOT here -- so this file is safe-ish to share. Pin numbers below are the verified ESP32-S3 Super Mini defaults from the bring-up on 2026-04-24.

mqtt._comment: Local LAN MQTT broker. See docs/mqtt_topics.md for topic tree.

pins._comment: GPIO numbers, verified on ESP32-S3 Super Mini.

_buzzer_comment: Optional piezo buzzer for the play_tone command. Set to a free GPIO (e.g. 7) once a buzzer is wired; null disables the command and play_tone responds with 'no buzzer_pin configured'.

cadences_s._comment: Sensor sampling periods per SPEC §6. Editable at runtime.
